label: Map generator
description: Defines how a map is procedurally generated, including the sequence of gen steps, terrain, roofing, and rendering options.

isUnderground.label: Is underground
isUnderground.description: If true, the generated map is treated as underground (caves, no sky).

forceCaves.label: Force caves
forceCaves.description: If true, cave generation is forced on this map regardless of biome.

genSteps.label: Gen steps
genSteps.description: Ordered list of GenStepDefs that are executed during map generation.

customMapComponents.label: Custom map components
customMapComponents.description: Additional MapComponent subclasses added to the map at generation time.

pocketMapProperties.label: Pocket map properties
pocketMapProperties.description: Configuration for this generator when it creates a pocket map, including biome, temperature, and behavioral flags.

ignoreAreaRevealedLetter.label: Ignore area revealed letter
ignoreAreaRevealedLetter.description: If true, the letter sent when all map areas are revealed is suppressed.

roofDef.label: Roof def
roofDef.description: RoofDef placed over the entire map after generation.

disableShadows.label: Disable shadows
disableShadows.description: If true, shadow rendering is disabled on this map.

disableCallAid.label: Disable call aid
disableCallAid.description: If true, the call for aid comms option is disabled on this map.

disableMapClippers.label: Disable map clippers
disableMapClippers.description: If true, map clipper visuals are not shown on this map.

renderWorld.label: Render world
renderWorld.description: If true, the world sphere is rendered behind this map (used for space maps).

defeatRequiresCantReachUnfogged.label: Defeat requires cant reach unfogged
defeatRequiresCantReachUnfogged.description: If true, the defeat condition also requires that no enemies can reach any unfogged area.

defaultUnderGridTerrain.label: Default under-grid terrain
defaultUnderGridTerrain.description: TerrainDef placed beneath the primary terrain layer on this map.

validScenarioMap.label: Valid scenario map
validScenarioMap.description: If true, this generator can be selected as a starting map by scenario configuration.

mapClipperTexturePath.label: Map clipper texture path
mapClipperTexturePath.description: Texture path for the map clipper visual displayed around the map border.

mapClipperShader.label: Map clipper shader
mapClipperShader.description: ShaderTypeDef used to render the map clipper texture.
